headline: S&P 500 Rebounds Ahead Of Nvidia's Print, Oil Sinks 5% On Iran Truce Hopes: Stock Market Today
summary: U.S. stocks halt a three-day slide as oil tumbles 5% on revived Iran truce hopes, easing inflation fears ahead of Nvidia's results after the close.

headline: CrowdStrike To Rally Around 7%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
summary: Wall Street analysts changed outlook on top names. Goldman Sachs raised PSX target, BTIG cut DRVN target, Morgan Stanley cut NWL target, B of A raised TK target, Stifel raised PANW target, Mizuho cut HD target, Goldman Sachs raised ENPH target, B of A raised NTAP target.

headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Buy on Enphase Energy, Raises Price Target to $57
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Brian Lee   maintains Enphase Energy (NASDAQ:ENPH) with a Buy and raises the price target from $51 to $57.
